title: Section 7
content: No court shall proceed to the trial of any person for an offence against this Act except with the consent of 1 *** the 2 [District Magistrate].
footnote: 1. The words "the L.G. or" rep. by the A.O. 1937. 2. Subs. by Act 54 of 2001, s. 3, for "Central Government" (w.e.f. 1-2-2002).
